rulings.Case Title: ORIENTAL WAREHOUSE OWNERS' ASSOCIATION, A VS. ORIENTAL WAREHOUSE ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, January 25, 2010, line 1, CROSS DEFENDANT ALL-WEATHER ARCHITECTURAL ALUMINUM, INC. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. Demurrer to cross-complaint is overruled. 1) Regarding 3rd & 4th causes of action CCP sec. 428.10 expressly allows Indemnity Claim in underlying Tort Action; 2) Regarding 2nd & 5th causes of action, (A) (Per Carrier Corp vs. Detrex Corp. 4 Cal.App.4th 1522, 1527) UCC 2725 doesn't apply; (B) Tranditional CCP sec. 339 applies and discovery rule applies (2 years); (C) Complaint doesn't facially show time barred because paragraph 35 of the Amended Cross-Complaint "on or about" is not definite; 3) Declaratory Relief cause of action - See Blickman, leaving cause of action doesn't prejudice anyone. The Cause of action stands or falls with Indemnity. =(302/REQ)
